improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon, the Claude-powered assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating Gideon's value proposition and the free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Without these tags, social platforms pull random page content, reducing trust and engagement.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals. Try three searches free — no credit card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces Gideon by name and clarifies its core function, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the low-friction entry point with the free trial. Mentioning 'no credit card required' reduces signup hesitation and increases conversion likelihood.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual plans saving you 30 percent. As a member, you unlock unlimited access to Gideon's workspace, voice chat, and professional trade and business support.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey—the transition from free trial to paid membership. By clearly explaining what happens next and reinforcing the low entry price and value, it reduces uncertainty and supports conversion at the paywall moment.
